basic_details.job_title: IIT Tirupati Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati (IIT Tirupati) Project Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website of IIT Tirupati. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Tirupati Project Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation with minimum 60% marks, M.E./M.Tech or M.Sc in relevant discipline
qualification.details: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation with a minimum of 60% marks. Candidates with Msc in Electronics/M.E./M.Tech in a relevant discipline may also apply. Prior experience in data acquisition, Python scripting, and basic electronics is preferred.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Tirupati Project Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Tirupati Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Tirupati Project Officer position is 26th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech in Electrical, Electronics, or Instrumentation with at least 60% marks. M.Sc in Electronics or M.E./M.Tech in a relevant discipline are also acceptable qualifications.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Officer post is 45 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms, which can be found in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Officer position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Tirupati Project Officer job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address specified in the recruitment advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Officer role at IIT Tirupati will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Tirupati offer contractual positions?
faq.answer: Yes, this recruitment for the Project Officer position is on a contractual basis, offering a fixed tenure for the role.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Adv/IITT/CSRC/26-27/03.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any preferred qualifications or experience for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, prior experience in data acquisition, Python scripting, and basic electronics is preferred for the Project Officer position, which can enhance your application.
